title: ilex paucinervia
intro: Ilex paucinervia, also known as the Taiwan holly or Taiwan yew, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family, native to Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Ilex paucinervia is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of certain cancers and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ilex paucinervia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its potential health benefits.
